name: Blue Smiles Beach Towel - Sun Squad™
description:
Bring extra cheer to your sunny days outdoors with this Blue Smiles Beach Towel from Sun Squad™. Made from 100% terry cotton, this lightweight beach towel feels soft against your skin and helps you dry off quickly. Perfectly suited to spread on the sand, a beach chair, or a chaise lounge, it features allover blue smiley face emojis for fun style.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
